raw_transcript: Absolutely. Your liver still makes bile; it just drips into the intestine constantly instead of being stored and released in bursts. Most people digest food perfectly fine after surgery. Let's start with the ultrasound first.
final_corrected_note: Absolutely. Your liver still makes bile; it just drips into the intestine constantly instead of being stored and released in bursts. Most people digest food perfectly fine after surgery. Let's start with the ultrasound first.
